metadata.title: DoodleTON - Telegram Mini App Game with TON Rewards
metadata.description: Play DoodleTON, a Telegram Mini App and TON blockchain game where early players jump, collect DoodleTON Coins, build TON Progress, unlock Founder Badges and join the launch campaign.
metadata.keywords: DoodleTON, Doodle TON, Telegram Mini App game, Telegram game, Telegram crypto game, Telegram Web3 game, TON game, TON blockchain game, TON rewards game, Toncoin game, play to earn Telegram, play-to-earn TON, tap-to-earn TON, crypto rewards game, Web3 gaming, Telegram mini games, DoodleTON Coins, Founder Campaign, launch campaign, referral rewards, daily rewards, TON Progress, Founder Badges, Telegram community, TON ecosystem, vertical jumping game, jump game, crypto game on Telegram
metadata.ogTitle: DoodleTON Founder Campaign - Telegram TON Game
metadata.ogDescription: Jump, collect DoodleTON Coins, build TON Progress, invite friends and become one of the first DoodleTON players before launch.
metadata.twitterDescription: The DoodleTON Founder Campaign is live. Play on Telegram, collect DoodleTON Coins and build TON Progress before launch.

common.disclaimer: Rewards, balances and campaign rules may change before launch. Daily limits apply to keep gameplay fair.

landing.eyebrow: Game Launching Very Soon — Join Now
landing.heroDescription: DoodleTON is launching in days — not months. Play now, earn real rewards, and be part of an active community growing strong together before the coin drops.
landing.trust: Launching very soon on TON inside Telegram
landing.livePanelText: Every jump moves you closer to Founder rewards.
landing.aboutText: DoodleTON is a Telegram Mini App game built for the TON ecosystem. While other games make you wait 2–6 months, DoodleTON launches in days. Jump, collect rewards, and grow with a community that builds together from day one.
landing.aboutHighlight: First we launch the game — then the coin. Start now, be first.
landing.campaignText: We're not asking you to wait months. The game launches in days, and every session builds your position before the coin launch. Play daily, invite friends, grow your rewards — it's that simple.
campaignItems: Invite friends and earn bonus rewards
landing.rewardsTitle: Two Reward Loops, One Simple Game
landing.tonText: Collect TON items while playing. Every item increases your TON Progress and earns you real rewards at launch. Simple gameplay, real earnings — no complicated steps.
landing.coinText: DoodleTON Coins grow with every session and will play a key role at coin launch. The more active you are now, the stronger your position when the coin drops.
landing.inviteText: Bring friends into DoodleTON and build together. Invited players must reach Level 3 to qualify for referral rewards.
landing.whyText: Most tap-to-earn games make you wait 2, 3, even 6 months before launch. DoodleTON launches in days. Simple gameplay, real rewards, and a community that earns and builds together. Join now, be among the first.
landing.whyFinal: Days, not months. Your time to act is now.
landing.coinLaunchText: Our coin is almost here. We launch the game first — then the coin drops. The earlier you play and build your position, the stronger you'll be at launch. Follow our Telegram channel to be the first to know.
landing.coinLaunchCta: Join TG Channel for Latest News
landing.communityTitle: Build Together. Be Strong With Us.
landing.communityText: We are building an active and strong community where every player matters. DoodleTON is not just a game — it's a movement. Join our Telegram channel, follow the latest news, and grow strong with us as we launch the game and then the coin.
socialProof: Play today — earn your position before the coin launches in days
Other games: 2–6 months wait. DoodleTON: launching in days.
Active community building and growing together from day one
landing.finalText: Join an active community that earns together. The game launches in days — be one of the first players and secure your position before the coin drops.

faqs.question: Is DoodleTON already live?
faqs.answer: The project is in its final launch stage. The landing page sends players to the official Telegram community, where campaign updates, safety information and access links are shared first.

faqs.question: How do TON rewards work?
faqs.answer: Players collect TON items and build TON Progress during gameplay. Launch rewards are calculated from campaign activity, with daily limits designed to keep the game fair.

faqs.question: What are DoodleTON Coins?
faqs.answer: DoodleTON Coins are in-game campaign points collected while playing. They grow with your activity and will matter during launch.

faqs.question: Why should I invite friends?
faqs.answer: Invites unlock bonus rewards and badges. Referred players must reach Level 3 before the referral reward qualifies.
